title: Fcγ Receptor Polymorphism in Patients with Relapsed/Refractory High-Risk Neuroblastoma Correlates with Outcomes in the SIOPEN Dinutuximab Beta Long-Term Infusion Trial.
abstract: To identify a tolerable dinutuximab beta long-term infusion (LTI) schedule with immunomodulatory activity for relapsed/refractory high-risk neuroblastoma (HRNBL).
